html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Onion Plant is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Pointy Seeds (also named Onion Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow an Onion Plant by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Autumn, Spring and Summer, so in Winter it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Onion and 0-2 Pointy/Onion Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Onion, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Onions and 2-3 Pointy/Onion Seeds.

The Onion stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Onion stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Onion Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Onion Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Onion Plant in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Onion Plant''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Pointy Seeds|Pointy Seeds]] (also named Onion Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow an Onion Plant by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Autumn]], [[Spring]] and [[Summer]], so in [[Winter]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Onion]] and 0-2 Pointy/Onion Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Onion|Giant Onion]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Onions and 2-3 Pointy/Onion Seeds.

The Onion stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Onion stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Onion Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Onion Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
